name: Lethal Layers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine the first three ingredients with a metal blade until crumbly. This can also be done using two pastry knives or a pastry cutter.
2. Pat the mixture into a buttered 9-by-13-inch pan.
3. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes. Cool.
4. When the crust is cool, spread pecans evenly over the surface.
5. Beat eggs with brown sugar until thick. Add vanilla.
6. Put salt and baking powder in the bottom of a 1/4 cup measure; fill the rest of the measure with flour.
7. Stir the flour into the egg mixture.
8. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes or until the center is baked. Cool, then cut into 32 pieces.
